name: Kala Point Sport Court
description: Come play pickleball at Kala Point Sport Court in Port Townsend, WA! There is 1 outdoor court. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The court is private.

name: Mountain View Commons
description:
3 brand new dedicated pickleball courts with individual fencing.
Go to www.PTpickleball.com for current schedules and protocol.

name: Port Ludlow Park
description: Come play pickleball at Port Ludlow Park in Port Ludlow, WA! There is 1 outdoor asphalt court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. The court is private. You can’t reserve the court.

name: Port Ludlow Pickleball Club
description: This is a private club, but you can play twice as our guest.

name: Port Townsend Courthouse Pickleball Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Port Townsend Courthouse Pickleball Courts in Port Townsend, WA! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts cannot be reserved. The courts are free.

name: Port Townsend High School
description: Port Townsend High School is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Port Townsend, WA. There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are private.

name: Quilcene Community Center
description: Come play pickleball at Quilcene Community Center in Quilcene, WA! There is 1 outdoor asphalt court. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The court is private.

name: Rainier LN Sport Court
description: Rainier LN Sport Court is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Port Ludlow, WA. There is 1 outdoor court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The court is private.
